title: Heat + Water: Boil Water Safely
description: Learn the basics of boiling water safely and efficiently.

steps.instruction: Choose a pot. A medium-sized pot is good for boiling water for pasta.
Fill the pot with cold water. Leave some space at the top.

check.prompt: Is the pot filled with water? (Yes/No)

steps.instruction: Place the lid on the pot. This helps the water boil faster.

check.prompt: Is the lid on the pot? (Yes/No)

steps.instruction: Turn the stove to high heat. Wait for the water to reach a rolling boil.
Once boiling, you can reduce the heat to a simmer if needed, or proceed with cooking.

check.prompt: Have you adjusted the heat if necessary? (Yes/No)
